🔍 *ENRICH REVIEW*  \[✨ ENRICHED\]

*Name:* Dunaverty Castle
*Country:* scotland
*Region:* argyll western isles
*County:* Argyll and Bute
*Type:* castle
*Period:* 13th century
*Coords:* 55.3075, -5.6447
*Wikipedia:* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dunaverty_Castle
*Maps:* https://www.google.com/maps/search/Dunaverty%20Castle%20Argyll%20and%20Bute%20scotland
*Main Image:* https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/26/Dunaverty_-_geograph.org.uk_-_735878.jpg/330px-Dunaverty_-_geograph.org.uk_-_735878.jpg
*Gallery:* 0 images
*Image Source:* wikipedia
*Has Wikipedia:* yes
*Has Google Places:* unknown
*Enrich Notes:* Update google link to this https://maps.app.goo.gl/whDtjSdSDNAGm2wk7 

*Description:*
Dunaverty Castle is located at Southend at the southern end of the Kintyre peninsula in western Scotland. The site was once a fort belonging to the Clan Donald (MacDonald). Little remains of the castle, although the site is protected as a scheduled monument.

_Listing 1 of 10_
